reviews.review_msg: He is such a nice person, very passionate about sharing his life with the class. Highly recommended!

Easy course and mostly straightforward. However, assignments appeared randomly and deadlines weren't always clear, making it hard to stay organized. The 3-day grace period helped. The TA was excellent and very supportive. The professor should improve course organization.
super chill class, lectures really aren't important unless u wanna answer a question for a piece of candy lol. just keep up with assignments and you'll be fine!
Amazing prof at SFU. Always made the class enjoyable and she would bring treats for us. Assignments were easy and only counted for a pass/fail.

Great person, she really wishes the best for students to succeed, and is also very involved with the CMC, and Beedie community. BUS 203 overall was boring, no need to show up to lectures, just complete assignments with effort and don't slack. Just don't fail or u ruin your whole career!

Did not attend a single lecture, just do the assignments online and you'll be fine. BUS 203 is just one credit and its pass or fail, as long as you do the canvas assignments you'll be fine. No stress, easy marker and very nice. Gives you candy :)

To those who are having issues with 201. 203 is a corequisite, so dropping 201 also means dropping 203.

The course was fun. I was initially scared given my other instructor, but she was nice. She seems to care about the students as well, and is very much open for questions and extra help if asked. The course isn't bad if you can market yourself.

Natalia is an awesome prof who makes this class super fun. Many students started to skip because it is pretty much career life education in university (A bit boring and unhelpful), but if you have time, go and participate because she's an amazing prof. Keep up with the assignments because it is pass or fail, so an incomplete could screw you over.

Loved her class and her enthusiasm. She knew since it is a pass/fail class many students wouldn't show up (lectures were 80% empty) or put in much effort but tried to make the most out of it. Always willing to help students, and I enjoyed attending the class after long days of BUS 201 with Ilia... Gives out treats in class and simple assignments.

Pass/Fail course. Attendance not necessary as all you are required to do to pass the course is hand in all assignments (They are all very simple and can be completed within an hour or two). She is extremely nice and is a good connection to have as she works in the CMC. Not a bad thing to say about her!
She's an amazing teacher. I found her class very easy but her lectures were boring and you do not need to attend them.

Natalia sweet, kind & caring. Can't blame her for teaching a close to useless class. Lectures are not mandatory. Submit your work even if poorly done and you should pass (pass/fail class). She helped a friend pass in the last week even though he hadn't submitted 3+ assignments. She is very helpful with career/school related advice in office hours.

She's a very nice person, works in admin, talk to her there. But class is useless, graded on pass/fail, does not count for GPA. Do your assignments and don't worry about the class. Lectures are how to be a responsible university student, totally useless.
Natalia is a very nice professor. She does make an effort to make the class interesting but the class itself is quite boring
She is so nice for this 1 credit P/F course! Excellent!
love this teacher, just love her
